_comment: PASS — fully compliant PPDS sandwich record. All 14 allergen declarations present. Gluten cereal type named (wheat). No tree nuts or sulphites.
ingredients_text: Malted wheat bread (wheat flour, water, malted wheat flakes, yeast, salt, rapeseed oil), bacon (pork, salt, preservative: sodium nitrite), lettuce, tomato, mayonnaise (rapeseed oil, free range eggs, white wine vinegar, salt, mustard).
